steps.title: Use the initial balance
steps.content: The initial balance is $42{,}000.00$, so the coefficient of the exponential model must be $42{,}000.00$.

steps.title: Choose a growth factor
steps.content: The account balance after $12$ years is greater than the initial balance, so the base must be greater than $1$. A base of $1.08$ represents growth, while a base of $0.08$ represents decay.

steps.title: Select the matching model
steps.content:
The model with initial value $42{,}000.00$ and growth factor $1.08$ is
$$A(t)=42{,}000.00(1.08)^t$$
The answer is A.
